Many said this war would be over in four days. Yet four years later, Ukraine is winning and pushing back Russian aggression. My full interview:

Senator Lindsey Graham was a visionary, a courageous patriot, and a personal mentor and friend. We shared the same worldview: that the U.S. is strongest at home when we're strongest abroad. Congress can honor his life and legacy by swiftly passing his tough Russia sanctions bill. https://t.co/9huAdguuVO

From foreign adversaries to cartels, bad actors are increasingly using drones to target infrastructure & innocent civilians. As the U.S. prepares to host millions of visitors for the FIFA World Cup & America250 celebrations, we must be prepared to neutralize this evolving threat.

My Guard the Skies Act would leverage the National Guard—a force prepared for rapid deployment & crisis response—to protect our skies & the gatherings below. This bipartisan bill will ensure these events reflect American excellence in every aspect, including our security posture.

With only 44 days until the first @FIFAWorldCup game, we must do everything in our power to secure the airspace over our 11 host cities. While the Safer Skies Act was a vital step forward, the tournament’s scale requires us to build upon that foundation immediately.
